description: Extensive writing exercises in which the instructor provided the Hebrew alphabet in model handwriting for a student to repeat. The student's surname Palonbo (Palombo) appears in several of the headings but the scribal hands shift signifcant from exercise to exercise– suggesting that other students used the same piece of paper. MCD.
tags: early modern, 16th c or later, learning
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
